title: taraxacum intercedens
intro: Taraxacum intercedens, also known as the Intermediate Dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support liver and kidney function, and its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum intercedens include improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum intercedens typically involve infusions of the leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used in tinctures and capsules.
